20

22
23
24
25
26 Man Tax: Alberto Guerra
If you want creative workers, give them enough time to play. -John Cleese So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. For the couple people that have said I'm "scamming" people, I only get SNAP, so this money goes to things like TP, shampoo, laundry detergent, etc.
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: Secret Weapon
item.description: magine an alternate universe where we couldn’t make comics and be forced to get a real job! Trains would be crashing, pots would be exploding, and our patient would be flatlining on the operating table while we tested out our latest jokes on the OR staff. By joining our Patreon you enable us to do what we do best: making you laugh week for week, come rain or shine, with our comics. Your support means we don’t have to get a real job, which saves hundreds –nay – thousands of lives each week. Amazing! https://www.patreon.com/warandpeas
item.dc:creator: Warandpeasofficial

item.dc:creator: snafu999

item.title: GovBrief Today #527
item.description: Kash Patel spent Friday inside the White House running a criminal investigation of The New York Times. The Times reported that Trump's $400 million Qatari gift plane still hasn't been fitted with missile defenses, so the Secret Service flew him home from the NATO summit in Turkey on the old Air Force One. The White House ordered the FBI director to hunt for whoever said so. He worked from the West Wing instead of FBI headquarters, collapsing a separation between the White House and criminal investigations that dates back to Watergate. By nightfall, four Times reporters had been subpoenaed to appear before a grand jury next week, some served by federal agents at their front doors. The subpoenas don't name the crime being investigated. I've emailed 8,189 stories over 527 straight nights, free and without ads. The algorithm can't show them all to you. Add your email address at govbrief.today and I will. Subscribe (It's free!): https://gbounacos.substack.com/ Today's full brief: https://go.govbrief.today/260710-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/khanna-detained [2] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-july11 [3] https://go.govbrief.today/yle-cyclopoirasis [4] https://go.govbrief.today/patel-reporters [5] https://go.govbrief.today/wi-masks [6] https://go.govbrief.today/beshear-mcconnell-2 [7] https://go.govbrief.today/kenctr-whistleblower [8] https://go.govbrief.today/nyc-cancels [9] https://go.govbrief.today/az-observers Subscribe (It's free!): https://gbounacos.substack.com/
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: A little more celebration.
item.description: Well, it wasn't long before one of these comments popped off. So, made a little video with the wife while we were having morning coffee. Don't forget how many times the President of the United States, Donald Trump, had said horrible things when people passed away. I don't feel the slightest bit bad. "Lindsey Graham was among the most viciously racist & bloodthirsty warmongers in the history of Congress. That he was also pretty clearly a closeted gay man who chose to make the lives of all marginalized people miserable in service to power says everything about him. Rest in piss" A Great Start to the Day https://imgur.com/gallery/xE93ACl If anybody would like to help us buy some coffee, that would be amazing. https://www.paypal.com/paypalme/RoderickSquareshttps://linktr.ee/GridSquares
item.dc:creator: SquaresUnfiltered

item.title: Rest in Piss
item.description: And he is gone. Lindsey Graham, one of the terrible human being in the Senate is dead ! No Election Interference in Georgia and no support of military interventions from him anymore. And with the dead of this anti-gay bigot, Grinder lost one of its biggest users. Have a wonderful Sunday everyone !
item.dc:creator: onushka

item.title: All Fascists Burn in Hell. No Exceptions.

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1745 (annular throbber)
item.description:
Lets get this bread.
Spoon-billed sandpipers are severely endangered
Yeah this tracks
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "Pip! Step up. Pippin. Pippin!" ___1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Let's send food to Imgurians in need
item.description:
Happy Sunday everyone, we're all excited for TheFreePizzaDude post today! If you'd like to help a struggling Imgurian get groceries or a meal today there are 2 easy ways -
You can find a request for food in the comments, reply to them and then send a DM to get an order set up Or you can contribute to the Imgurian Meal Fund and we'll send the food for you!
Anonymous Angels have been a big help in feeding more people, we love you so much! https://www.paypal.me/TheFreePizzaDude https://ko-fi.com/thefreepizzadude
And here's how you'd send it yourself! Any questions as an Angel? Just shoot us a message! We'll be on this username until 6pm central
Puckett is here to show you how it works for requests -
It's much easier for us to help requests in the US but we'll do our best to pick up requests from any country. Putting your country in your comment helps us match you to an Angel in your area
Any questions as a requestor? Just leave a comment! We'll have Angels on this post for 6 hours
6 more hours to help as many people as we can Let's get it going! ... Today's Meal Tally 1st, 2nd, 3rd and 4th by @OP 5th, 6th and 7th by Pizza Angel @jennytornado 8th. 9th, 10th and 11th by @OP 12th by Pizza Angel @jaenen 13th, 14th and 15th by Pizza Angel @jennytornado 16th and 17th by Pizza Angel @rawrberry
item.dc:creator: TheFreePizzaDude
